title: Rajgarh Fort
tagline: Rajgarh Fort — heritage city of Rajasthan

overview.short: Rajgarh Fort, also known as hill ‌Fort, ‌is a historic‌ fortification‌ situated‌ in ‌the ‌Aravalli Hills‌ ‌near Rajgarh‌ town‌, Alwar district, Rajasthan, India, at approximately 2
overview.description: Rajgarh Fort, also known as hill ‌Fort, ‌is a historic‌ fortification‌ situated‌ in ‌the ‌Aravalli Hills‌ ‌near Rajgarh‌ town‌, Alwar district, Rajasthan, India, at approximately 27°14'N 76°37'E, with an elevation of 479 meters (1,571 feet). It was constructed in the 1730s and 1740s by Maharaja Sawai Jai Singh the kachwaha ruler of Jaipur. The fort, now in ruins, is maintained by the Archaeological Survey of India.

topPlaces.name: Rajgarh, Alwar
topPlaces.description: Rajgarh is a town and a tehsil in Alwar district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. Bhangarh, Asia's most haunted place, is also present in Rajgarh, Alwar tehsil.

topPlaces.name: Saloli, Rajasthan
topPlaces.description: Saloli is a large village located in Reni tehsil of Alwar district, Rajasthan with a total of 550 families residing. Saloli village has a population of 2807 of which 1488 are males while 1319 are females as per Population Census 2011.

items.note: Rajgarh is a town and a tehsil in Alwar district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. Bhangarh, Asia's most haunted place, is also present in Rajgarh, Alwar tehsil.

Saloli is a large village located in Reni tehsil of Alwar district, Rajasthan with a total of 550 families residing. Saloli village has a population of 2807 of which 1488 are males while 1319 are females as per Population Census 2011.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rajgarh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rajgarh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rajgarh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rajgarh Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rajgarh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rajgarh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Rajgarh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rajgarh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajgarh, Alwar, Saloli, Rajasthan.
